title: chrome clone
description: Request to create a clone of the Chrome browser.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: chrome clone (DEM-2026-0105)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a functional clone of the Chrome browser to enhance internal control over browser capabilities and customization. It addresses the need for a tailored web browsing solution aligned with company infrastructure requirements.

Business Value/Impact  
Creating a Chrome clone will enable improved security, performance optimization, and feature customization, driving efficiency and reducing reliance on third-party software. This strategic move supports long-term technological independence and potential cost savings.

Risk Mitigation  
Given the high-risk level, thorough code reviews, rigorous testing, and iterative development cycles will be implemented. Additionally, compliance with security standards and continuous monitoring will reduce vulnerabilities and operational risks.
